info.name: School Management API
info.description:
API collection for the School Management system. Includes Add School and List Schools (sorted by proximity) endpoints.

**Base URL**: `https://school-management-api-production-cd77.up.railway.app` (update to your deployed host)

**Setup**:
1. Import this collection into Postman.
2. Set the `base_url` variable to your server address.
3. Run requests in order: Add Schools first, then List Schools.

variable.description: Base URL of the API server

request.description: Verify the server is up and running.
Adds a new school to the database. All four fields are required.

response.name: 201 Created

request.description: Demonstrates validation: empty name, missing latitude/longitude.

response.name: 422 Unprocessable Entity
422 Unprocessable Entity

request.description: Returns all schools sorted by distance from the given coordinates (Gurugram). Each school includes a `distance_km` field.

response.name: 200 OK

request.description: Demonstrates validation when latitude/longitude are not provided.

response.name: 422 Unprocessable Entity
